schemes.name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (MJPJAY)
schemes.name_hi: महात्मा ज्योतिराव फुले जन आरोग्य योजना
schemes.description: A health insurance scheme providing free medical care to BPL and APL families in Maharashtra.
schemes.description_hi: महाराष्ट्र में बीपीएल और एपीएल परिवारों को मुफ्त चिकित्सा देखभाल प्रदान करने वाली एक स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना।
schemes.benefits: Free medical care up to ₹1.5 lakh per family per year for 971 types of diseases/surgeries.
schemes.application_process:
1. Visit the nearest network hospital.
2. Show your Ration Card and Aadhaar to the Arogyamitras.
3. Complete the registration and admit the patient for cashless treatment.

schemes.name: Gruha Lakshmi Scheme
schemes.description: Financial assistance scheme to support the women head of households in Karnataka.
schemes.description_hi: कर्नाटक में परिवारों की महिला मुखिया की सहायता के लिए वित्तीय सहायता योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹2,000 per month transferred directly to the bank account of the woman head of the family.
schemes.application_process:
1. Visit the Seva Sindhu Guarantee portal.
2. Apply online using Aadhaar and Ration Card details.
3. Beneficiaries can also apply offline at Grama One/Bapuji Seva Kendra.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Samman Yojana
schemes.description: Financial empowerment scheme for women residing in Delhi.
schemes.description_hi: दिल्ली में रहने वाली महिलाओं के लिए वित्तीय सशक्तिकरण योजना।
schemes.benefits: Direct cash transfer of ₹1,000 per month to eligible women.
schemes.application_process:
1. Fill the self-declaration form available at designated centers.
2. Submit online or at government camps.
3. Fund will be directly credited via DBT.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana
schemes.ministry: Women and Child Development, Uttar Pradesh
schemes.description: A conditional cash transfer scheme to support the birth and education of girl children in UP.
schemes.description_hi: यूपी में बालिकाओं के जन्म और शिक्षा का समर्थन करने के लिए एक सशर्त नकद हस्तांतरण योजना।
schemes.benefits: Total financial assistance of ₹25,000 provided in 6 phases from the birth of the girl child to her graduation.
schemes.application_process:
1. Register on the official portal mksy.up.gov.in.
2. Fill out the application form with required documents.
3. The application is verified by the district authorities before funds are released.

schemes.name: Lakshmir Bhandar
schemes.ministry: Department of Women & Child Development, West Bengal
schemes.description: Basic income support scheme for female heads of families in West Bengal.
schemes.description_hi: पश्चिम बंगाल में परिवारों की महिला मुखिया के लिए बुनियादी आय सहायता योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹1000 per month for General category and ₹1200 per month for SC/ST category women.
schemes.application_process:
1. Application forms are available free of cost at Duare Sarkar camps.
2. Submit the filled form with document copies at the camp.
3. Receive acknowledgment receipt.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Ladli Behna Yojana
schemes.ministry: Women and Child Development, Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: Scheme to enhance women's economic independence and improve health/nutrition status.
schemes.description_hi: महिलाओं की आर्थिक स्वतंत्रता बढ़ाने और स्वास्थ्य/पोषण की स्थिति में सुधार करने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹1,250 per month credited directly to Aadhaar-linked bank accounts.
schemes.application_process:
1. Applications are filled out at Gram Panchayat/Ward level camps.
2. E-KYC is mandatory.
3. Photograph is taken during the camp application.

schemes.name: Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Universal health insurance scheme covering almost the entire population of Rajasthan.
schemes.description_hi: राजस्थान की लगभग पूरी आबादी को कवर करने वाली सार्वभौमिक स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना।
schemes.benefits: Cashless health insurance coverage up to ₹25 lakh per family per year.
schemes.application_process:
1. Register online on the SSO Rajasthan portal or via E-Mitra.
2. Link Jan Aadhaar with the policy.
3. Premium is free for BPL/NFSA/Farmers; others pay ₹850/year.

schemes.name: KALIA (Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation)
schemes.name_hi: कालिया (आजीविका और आय संवर्धन के लिए कृषक सहायता)
schemes.ministry: Department of Agriculture and Farmers' Empowerment, Odisha
schemes.description: A forward-looking scheme to accelerate agricultural prosperity and reduce poverty in Odisha.
schemes.description_hi: कृषि समृद्धि में तेजी लाने और गरीबी कम करने के लिए एक दूरदर्शी योजना।
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of ₹4,000 per year for cultivation (Small/Marginal Farmers). Landless agricultural households get ₹12,500 for livelihood.
schemes.application_process:
1. Apply online at kalia.odisha.gov.in.
2. Submit documents for verification at the GP level.
3. Amount directly credited to bank account.

schemes.name: Orunodoi Scheme
schemes.description: Aimed at providing financial assistance to poor households in Assam through women empowerment.
schemes.description_hi: महिला सशक्तिकरण के माध्यम से असम में गरीब परिवारों को वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करना।
schemes.benefits: ₹1,250 per month credited directly to the bank account of the nominated female head of the household.
schemes.application_process:
1. Fill the Orunodoi application form at the Gaon Panchayat level.
2. The District Level Monitoring Committee approves the list.
3. Funds are transferred via DBT.

schemes.name: FOCUS Meghalaya
schemes.description: Farmers Collectivization for Up-scaling of Production and Marketing Systems.
schemes.description_hi: उत्पादन और विपणन प्रणालियों के उन्नयन के लिए किसानों का एकत्रीकरण।
schemes.benefits: Seed capital of ₹5,000 per member of a Producer Group to boost agriculture and allied activities.
schemes.application_process:
1. Form a Producer Group (PG) with 10-20 members.
2. Register the PG with the Basin Development Unit.
3. Receive funds in the PG bank account.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Yuba Yogayog Yojana
schemes.description: Scheme to provide grants to final year college/university students for purchasing smartphones.
schemes.description_hi: अंतिम वर्ष के कॉलेज छात्रों को स्मार्टफोन खरीदने के लिए अनुदान प्रदान करने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: One-time financial grant of ₹5,000 for purchasing a smartphone.
schemes.application_process:
1. Purchase a smartphone and get a valid GST invoice.
2. Apply online through the BMAS portal of Tripura Government.
3. Upload the invoice and college details for DBT transfer.

schemes.name: Vahli Dikri Yojana
schemes.description: Financial assistance to improve the birth rate of girls and strengthen their socio-economic status.
schemes.description_hi: लड़कियों की जन्म दर में सुधार और उनकी सामाजिक-आर्थिक स्थिति को मजबूत करने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: ₹1.10 Lakh given in three installments (at Class 1, Class 9, and at age 18).
schemes.application_process: Apply offline at Anganwadi centers or CDPO offices.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojana
schemes.description: Encourages girl education and prevents female infanticide.
schemes.description_hi: बालिका शिक्षा को प्रोत्साहित करता है और कन्या भ्रूण हत्या को रोकता है।
schemes.benefits: Around ₹54,100 from birth to graduation, distributed in phases.
schemes.application_process: Apply online via the E-Kalyan portal.

schemes.name: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam
schemes.description: Basic income scheme for women heads of eligible households.
schemes.description_hi: पात्र परिवारों की महिला मुखियाओं के लिए बुनियादी आय योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹1,000 per month transferred directly to the bank account.
schemes.application_process: Applications collected via camps at Ration Shops.

schemes.name: YSR Rythu Bharosa
schemes.description: Financial assistance to farmers, including tenant farmers, to meet crop expenses.
schemes.description_hi: फसल के खर्चों को पूरा करने के लिए किसानों, जिनमें किरायेदार किसान भी शामिल हैं, को वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: ₹13,500 per farmer family per year (includes PM-KISAN component).
schemes.application_process: Village secretariats identify and register eligible farmers.

schemes.name: LIFE Mission
schemes.description: Livelihood Inclusion and Financial Empowerment scheme providing houses to landless and homeless.
schemes.description_hi: आजीविका समावेशन और वित्तीय सशक्तिकरण योजना जो भूमिहीनों और बेघरों को घर प्रदान करती है।
schemes.benefits: Financial aid up to ₹4 Lakhs for constructing a house.
schemes.application_process: Apply via local Panchayat/Municipality when phases are announced.

schemes.name: Aashirwad Scheme
schemes.ministry: Social Justice, Empowerment and Minorities, Punjab
schemes.description: Financial assistance for the marriage of girls from SC/BC/EWS families.
schemes.description_hi: SC/BC/EWS परिवारों की लड़कियों की शादी के लिए वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: ₹51,000 provided for marriage expenses.
schemes.application_process: Apply via Ashirwad Portal before or up to 30 days after the marriage.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Antyodaya Parivar Utthan Yojana
schemes.description: Aims to uplift the poorest families by providing skill development, wage employment, and self-employment opportunities.
schemes.description_hi: कौशल विकास, मजदूरी रोजगार और स्वरोजगार के अवसर प्रदान करके सबसे गरीब परिवारों का उत्थान करना।
schemes.benefits: Skill training and subsidized loans to bring family income above ₹1 Lakh/year.
schemes.application_process: Identified automatically via the PPP database. Beneficiaries are called to Melas.

schemes.name: Rythu Bandhu Scheme
schemes.description: Agriculture Investment Support Scheme to provide initial investment support to agriculture and horticulture crops.
schemes.description_hi: कृषि और बागवानी फसलों को प्रारंभिक निवेश सहायता प्रदान करने के लिए कृषि निवेश सहायता योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹5,000 per acre per season to support farm investment.
schemes.application_process: Apply via Agriculture Extension Officers.

schemes.name: Rajiv Gandhi Kisan Nyay Yojana
schemes.description: Income support scheme for farmers to encourage crop production.
schemes.description_hi: फसल उत्पादन को प्रोत्साहित करने के लिए किसानों के लिए आय सहायता योजना।
schemes.benefits: Up to ₹10,000 per acre input assistance provided for registered crops.
schemes.application_process: Register via RAEOs (Rural Agriculture Extension Officers).

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Maiyan Samman Yojana
schemes.description: Financial scheme aimed at empowering adult women in the state.
schemes.description_hi: राज्य में वयस्क महिलाओं को सशक्त बनाने के उद्देश्य से वित्तीय योजना।
schemes.benefits: Direct cash transfer of ₹1,000 per month.
schemes.application_process: Register through designated online portals and camps.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi Pyari Behna Samman Nidhi Yojana
schemes.name_hi: इंदिरा गांधी प्यारी बहना सम्मान निधि योजना
schemes.description: Guaranteed income scheme for the women of Himachal Pradesh.
schemes.description_hi: हिमाचल प्रदेश की महिलाओं के लिए गारंटीकृत आय योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹1,500 monthly financial assistance.
schemes.application_process: Submit application forms at the tehsil welfare office.

schemes.name: Nanda Gaura Yojana
schemes.ministry: Women Empowerment and Child Development, Uttarakhand
schemes.description: Scheme to improve the gender ratio and promote girl child education.
schemes.description_hi: लिंगानुपात में सुधार और बालिका शिक्षा को बढ़ावा देने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹11,000 on birth and ₹51,000 upon passing class 12th.
schemes.application_process: Apply via Anganwadi centers or WECD portal.

schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Bunkar Yojana
schemes.ministry: Department of Textile and Handicrafts, Arunachal Pradesh
schemes.description: Scheme to encourage women weavers and provide them with working capital.
schemes.description_hi: महिला बुनकरों को प्रोत्साहित करने और उन्हें कार्यशील पूंजी प्रदान करने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: 7% interest subvention on short term credit / working capital loan.
schemes.application_process: Apply through the Circle Officer or local Textile Department office.

schemes.name: Griha Aadhar Scheme
schemes.description: Financial assistance to address the problem of inflation for housewives.
schemes.description_hi: गृहिणियों के लिए मुद्रास्फीति की समस्या के समाधान हेतु वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: ₹1,500 per month provided directly to the bank account of the housewife.
schemes.application_process: Submit application to the Directorate of Women & Child Development.

schemes.name: Chief Minister-gi Hakshelgi Tengbang (CMHT)
schemes.description: Health assurance scheme for the poor and vulnerable families in Manipur.
schemes.description_hi: मणिपुर में गरीब और कमजोर परिवारों के लिए स्वास्थ्य आश्वासन योजना।
schemes.benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹2 Lakhs per family per year.
schemes.application_process: Enrollment through designated CMHT kiosks at district hospitals.

schemes.name: Socio-Economic Development Policy (SEDP)
schemes.description: Flagship program to accelerate economic growth through agriculture and allied sectors.
schemes.description_hi: कृषि और संबद्ध क्षेत्रों के माध्यम से आर्थिक विकास को गति देने का प्रमुख कार्यक्रम।
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of ₹50,000 to family-oriented trades/farming.
schemes.application_process: Submit project plans to respective line departments (Agriculture/Horticulture).

schemes.name: Chief Minister's Micro Finance Initiative
schemes.description: Scheme to promote entrepreneurship and farming by easing access to credit.
schemes.description_hi: ऋण तक आसान पहुंच द्वारा उद्यमिता और खेती को बढ़ावा देने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: Subsidy up to 30% on project cost (max ₹5 Lakhs) for micro-enterprises.
schemes.application_process: Apply via District Level Implementation Committee.

schemes.name: Sikkim Aama Yojana
schemes.description: Financial assistance scheme to instil a habit of saving among non-working mothers.
schemes.description_hi: कामकाजी नहीं होने वाली माताओं में बचत की आदत डालने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹20,000 deposited annually into the bank accounts of eligible mothers.
schemes.application_process: Forms filled and verified via Gram Panchayats.

schemes.name: Andaman & Nicobar Old Age Pension Scheme
schemes.name_hi: अंडमान और निकोबार वृद्धावस्था पेंशन योजना
schemes.ministry: Social Welfare, Andaman and Nicobar Islands
schemes.description: Pension scheme for senior citizens of the UT.
schemes.description_hi: केंद्र शासित प्रदेश के वरिष्ठ नागरिकों के लिए पेंशन योजना।
schemes.benefits: ₹2,500 monthly pension for destitute senior citizens.
schemes.application_process: Apply via Tehsil office or online portal.

schemes.name: Chandigarh Apni Beti Apna Mian
schemes.description: Scheme to elevate the status of the girl child in the society.
schemes.description_hi: समाज में बालिकाओं का स्तर ऊंचा उठाने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: Financial grant at birth and scholarships during schooling.
schemes.application_process: Submit forms at the Anganwadi centers.

schemes.name: Saraswati Vidya Yojana
schemes.ministry: Education Department, Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
schemes.description: Scheme to promote female education.
schemes.description_hi: महिला शिक्षा को बढ़ावा देने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: Free bicycles for girl students of Class 8 and above.

states: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

schemes.application_process: Identified automatically by school authorities.

schemes.name: State Marriage Assistance Scheme (SMAS)
schemes.description: Financial assistance for poor girls of marriageable age.
schemes.description_hi: विवाह योग्य आयु की गरीब लड़कियों के लिए वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: ₹50,000 cash assistance provided prior to marriage.
schemes.application_process: Apply via Social Welfare Officer online or offline.

schemes.name: Rewa Scheme
schemes.description: Coaching assistance scheme for Ladakhi students preparing for national exams.
schemes.description_hi: राष्ट्रीय परीक्षाओं की तैयारी करने वाले लद्दाखी छात्रों के लिए कोचिंग सहायता योजना।
schemes.benefits: Up to ₹1 Lakh reimbursement for coaching fees for NEET, JEE, NDA, UPSC.
schemes.application_process: Apply online at ladakh.gov.in portal.

schemes.name: Lakshadweep Unemployment Allowance
schemes.description: Financial assistance to educated unemployed youth.
schemes.description_hi: शिक्षित बेरोजगार युवाओं को वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: ₹2,000 per month for registered unemployed graduates/postgraduates.
schemes.application_process: Apply via District Employment Exchange.

schemes.name: Perunthalaivar Kamarajar Financial Assistance
schemes.description: Fee reimbursement scheme for medical/engineering students.
schemes.description_hi: मेडिकल/इंजीनियरिंग छात्रों के लिए शुल्क प्रतिपूर्ति योजना।
schemes.benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement for CENTAC sponsored students.
schemes.application_process: Submitted via the college administration to the Directorate of Higher Education.

schemes.name: Biju Yuva Sashaktikaran Yojana (Free Laptop Scheme)
schemes.description: A state initiative providing free laptops to meritorious students passing class 12th.
schemes.description_hi: कक्षा 12वीं पास करने वाले मेधावी छात्रों को मुफ्त लैपटॉप प्रदान करने वाली राज्य की पहल।
schemes.benefits: Free laptop or ₹30,000 cash equivalent via Direct Benefit Transfer.
schemes.application_process: Eligible students are shortlisted by the State Council of Higher Education and apply via the portal.

schemes.name: Delhi Higher Education and Skill Development Guarantee Scheme
schemes.name_hi: दिल्ली उच्च शिक्षा और कौशल विकास गारंटी योजना
schemes.description: Provides guarantee for education loans to students who wish to pursue higher education in Delhi.
schemes.description_hi: दिल्ली में उच्च शिक्षा प्राप्त करने के इच्छुक छात्रों को शिक्षा ऋण के लिए गारंटी प्रदान करता है।
schemes.benefits: State government acts as guarantor for education loans up to ₹10 Lakhs without collateral.
schemes.application_process: Apply via the Delhi Government e-district portal with admission proof.

schemes.name: Chief Minister Employment Generation Programme (CMEGP)
schemes.description: Financial assistance to micro and small enterprises to generate employment opportunities.
schemes.description_hi: रोजगार के अवसर पैदा करने के लिए सूक्ष्म और लघु उद्यमों को वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: Subsidy up to 35% on project cost up to ₹50 Lakhs for setting up new businesses.
schemes.application_process: Apply online through the MahaCMEGP portal and submit the business plan.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana
schemes.description: Scheme to encourage educated unemployed youth to set up their own enterprises.
schemes.description_hi: शिक्षित बेरोजगार युवाओं को अपना उद्यम स्थापित करने के लिए प्रोत्साहित करने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: Margin money subsidy of 25% on loans up to ₹25 Lakhs for industry sector.
schemes.application_process: Submit application online on the UP MSME portal.

schemes.name: Yuva Nidhi Scheme
schemes.ministry: Skill Development, Entrepreneurship and Livelihood, Karnataka
schemes.description: Unemployment allowance for recent graduates and diploma holders in Karnataka.
schemes.description_hi: कर्नाटक में हाल ही में स्नातक और डिप्लोमा धारकों के लिए बेरोजगारी भत्ता।
schemes.benefits: ₹3,000/month for degree holders and ₹1,500/month for diploma holders for up to 2 years.
schemes.application_process: Register on the Seva Sindhu portal of the Karnataka Government.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Universal health insurance scheme providing free medical treatment to families in Rajasthan.
schemes.description_hi: राजस्थान में परिवारों को मुफ्त चिकित्सा उपचार प्रदान करने वाली सार्वभौमिक स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना।
schemes.benefits: Free cashless treatment up to ₹25 Lakhs per family per year in empanelled hospitals.
schemes.application_process: Automatic registration for NFSA/SECC families; others can register via e-Mitra by paying ₹850.

schemes.name: Yuvashree Scheme
schemes.description: Financial assistance to unemployed youth to increase their employability.
schemes.description_hi: बेरोजगार युवाओं को उनकी रोजगार क्षमता बढ़ाने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: Unemployment assistance of ₹1,500 per month.
schemes.application_process: Enroll in the Employment Bank portal and submit the application.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Seekho Kamao Yojana
schemes.ministry: Skill Development and Employment, Madhya Pradesh
schemes.description: Skill training with a monthly stipend for the youth of Madhya Pradesh.
schemes.description_hi: मध्य प्रदेश के युवाओं के लिए मासिक वजीफे के साथ कौशल प्रशिक्षण।
schemes.benefits: Monthly stipend ranging from ₹8,000 to ₹10,000 during the training period.
schemes.application_process: Register as a candidate on the MMSKY portal.

schemes.name: Swami Vivekananda Assam Youth Empowerment (SVAYEM) Yojana
schemes.name_hi: स्वामी विवेकानंद असम युवा अधिकारिता (SVAYEM) योजना
schemes.description: Financial assistance to generate employment opportunities for youth in the state.
schemes.description_hi: राज्य में युवाओं के लिए रोजगार के अवसर पैदा करने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: Seed capital of ₹50,000 to selected youth/groups to start businesses.
schemes.application_process: Apply through designated state portal when applications are announced.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Udyami Yojana
schemes.description: Scheme to promote entrepreneurship among youth, SC/ST, and women in Bihar.
schemes.description_hi: बिहार में युवाओं, एससी/एसटी और महिलाओं के बीच उद्यमशीलता को बढ़ावा देने की योजना।
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹10 Lakhs (₹5 Lakhs grant + ₹5 Lakhs interest-free loan).
schemes.application_process: Register and submit a detailed project report on the Udyami portal.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Amrutam (MA) Yojana
schemes.description: Health assurance scheme for BPL and lower-middle-class families.
schemes.description_hi: बीपीएल और निम्न-मध्यम वर्ग के परिवारों के लिए स्वास्थ्य आश्वासन योजना।
schemes.benefits: Cashless medical and surgical care up to ₹5 Lakhs per family per year.
schemes.application_process: Enrollment at designated civic centres or network hospitals to generate the MA Card.

schemes.description: Financial support for meritorious students of Andhra Pradesh.
schemes.description_hi: Financial support for meritorious students of Andhra Pradesh.
schemes.benefits: Annual scholarship of ₹10,000 for higher education.
